codemirror-desc: Waxay bixisaa muujinta syntax-ka ee tifaftiraha wikitext
codemirror-prefs-summary: Waxaad wax badan ka baran kartaa astaantan adigoo akhrinaya [https://www.mediawiki.org/wiki/Special:MyLanguage/Help:Extension:CodeMirror bogga caawinta].
codemirror-prefs-enable-help: Waxay khuseysaa marka la tafatirayo bogagga nuxurka iyo tusmooyinka.
codemirror-prefs-enable-code-help: Waxay khuseysaa marka la tafatirayo koodh sida JavaScript, CSS, ama module Lua.
codemirror-prefs-openlinks: Ku fur xiriiriyeyaasha adigoo isticmaalaya furaha wax ka beddelka + guji
codemirror-prefs-closetags: Daar xiritaanka otomaatiga ah ee calaamadaha HTML
codemirror-prefs-closebrackets: Daar xiritaanka otomaatiga ah ee qawaaniinta
codemirror-prefs-trailingwhitespace: Muuji meelaha bannaan ee ku yaal dhammaadka
codemirror-prefs-foldallrefs: Isku laab dhammaan calaamadaha <ref> si caadi ah
codemirror-match-case: Tixgeli far waaweyn iyo far yaryar
codemirror-regexp-invalid: Muujinta joogto ah oo aan sax ahayn
codemirror-special-char-zero-width-non-j: Kala-joojiye aan ku biirin oo eber-ballac ah
codemirror-special-char-narrow-nbsp: Meel bannaan cidhiidhi ah oo aan jabin
codemirror-keymap-tabescape: Si kooban u oggolow furaha Tab inuu diiradda uga saaro tifaftiraha
codemirror-keymap-tabmode: Awood ama joojin habka diiradda Tab
codemirror-keymap-startcompletion: Muuji soo jeedimaha dhamaystirka otomaatiga ah
codemirror-keymap-selectcompletion: Dooro soo jeedinta dhamaystirka otomaatiga ah
codemirror-keymap-moveline: Wareeji khadadka la doortay hal sadar kor ama hoos
codemirror-keymap-copyline: Nuqul khadadka la doortay khadka kore ama hoose
codemirror-keymap-multicursor: Hay $1 oo guji si aad u abuurto tilmaamayaal badan.
codemirror-keymap-crosshair: Hay $1 kadib guji oo jiid si aad u samayso xulashooyin leydi ah.
codemirror-keymap-openlinks: Hay $1 oo guji cinwaannada bogagga iyo URL-yada si aad ugu furto tab cusub.
codemirror-wikilint-bold-in-header: Qoraalka dhumucda leh ee cinwaanka qaybta
codemirror-wikilint-conflicting-image-pa: halbeegga cabbirka sawirka $1 ee is khilaafsan
codemirror-wikilint-duplicate-attribute: Sifo $1 oo laba jeer ku soo noqotay
codemirror-wikilint-duplicate-category: Qayb laba jeer ku soo noqotay
codemirror-wikilint-duplicate-id: Aqoonsiga HTML oo laba jeer ku soo noqday
codemirror-wikilint-duplicate-image-para: Halbeegga sawirka $1 oo laba jeer ku soo noqday
codemirror-wikilint-duplicate-parameter: Halbeegga qaabka oo laba jeer ku soo noqday
codemirror-wikilint-ext-in-html: Calaamada kordhinta ee sifooyinka calaamada HTML
codemirror-wikilint-header-in-html: Cinwaanka qaybta ee sifooyinka calaamda HTML
codemirror-wikilint-illegal-attribute-na: Magaca sifada oo aan sax ahayn
codemirror-wikilint-illegal-attribute-va: Qiimaha sifada oo aan sax ahayn
codemirror-wikilint-illegal-module: Magaca qaybta Scribunto oo aan sax ahayn
codemirror-wikilint-imagemap-without-ima: Khariiradda sawirka oo aan lahayn sawir
codemirror-wikilint-invalid-attribute: Qayb ka kooban magac sifo aan sax ahayn
codemirror-wikilint-invalid-content: Waxyaabo aan sax ahayn oo ku jira $1
codemirror-wikilint-invalid-conversion-f: Calanka beddelka oo aan sax ahayn
codemirror-wikilint-invalid-gallery: Sawir galeri ah oo aan sax ahayn
codemirror-wikilint-invalid-image-parame: Halbeegga sawirka oo aan sax ahayn
codemirror-wikilint-invalid-imagemap-lin: Xiriirin aan sax ahayn oo ku jirta khariidadda sawirka
codemirror-wikilint-invisible-triple-bra: Waxyaabo aan muuqan oo ku jira saddexda qaws ee isku xiga
codemirror-wikilint-italic-apostrophes: Calaamadaha xigashada ee farta jiifka ah
codemirror-wikilint-link-in-extlink: Xiriirin gudaha ah oo ku jirta xiriirin dibadeed
codemirror-wikilint-missing-function: Magaca shaqada qaybta Scribunto oo ka maqan
codemirror-wikilint-pipe-in-link: dheeraad ah "|" oo ku jira qoraalka xiriirinta
codemirror-wikilint-pipe-in-table: dheeraad ah "|" oo ku jira unugga jadwalka
codemirror-wikilint-template-in-link: tusmada ku jira bartilmaameedka xiriirinta gudaha
codemirror-wikilint-unbalanced-in-sectio: $1 aan isu dheellitirnayn ee cinwaanka qaybta
codemirror-wikilint-unclosed-comment: Faallo HTML ah oo aan la xirin
codemirror-wikilint-unclosed-quotes: Calaamadaha xigashada oo aan la xirin
codemirror-wikilint-unescaped-query: Xadhigga weydiinta oo aan la baxsanayn ee ku jira halbeeg aan la garenayn
codemirror-wikilint-unnecessary-encoding: Boqolleyda ku celcelinta aan loo baahnayn ee xiriirinta gudaha
codemirror-wikilint-variable-anchor: Barro doorsoome ah oo ku jira cinwaanka qaybta
codemirror-potentially-slow: Waxaa laga yaabaa inuu gaabis noqdo
codemirror-validate-js-syntaxerror: Khalad syntax-ka ah oo ku yaal tiirka $1 ee xariiqda $2: $3
codemirror-ve-limit-exceeded: Dukumeentigu aad buu u weyn yahay, sidaas darteed iftiiminta habdhiska waa la joojiyay.
